summary: Watch From Beginning International Feed Selection - Live Game
description:
GIVEN a live game is in-progress
AND the game has an international feed
AND videoFeeds for the game have a mediaState of MEDIA_ON
AND the user has the appropriate entitlements to watch the international feed

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects a game tile for a live in-progress game
AND selects the international video feed button in the Feed Select Modal
AND selects the [Start From The Beginning] button in the Secondary Feed Select Modal
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal/games page is dismissed
AND the video player maximizes to full screen
AND the international video feed starts playing from the beginning of the feed
